logs.en: v1.1.6 In some case(Install xapk with splited libs), the so files in sandbox maybe vanish. Now you can enter into file explorer in game launch view, select [Runtime Library] then [fix libs], try to fix this problem.
logs.zh: v1.1.6 特殊情况下，沙盒中游戏的库文件会消失（常见于分离了运行库的xapk安装后的游戏），导致游戏启动失败。可以在启动游戏界面的文件管理下，选择【运行库】—>【修复运行库】尝试修复
